Cnidarians on Singapore shores: photo index

cnidarians text index | hard corals text index | photo index Phylum Cnidaria Photo index of cnidarians on Singapore shores with soft bodies

Generally solitary polyps jellyfish and jelly-like anemones
and anemone-like

Colonies of tiny polyps thin branching tree-like
sea fans thin, fern-like sausage- or stick-like fluffy, encrusting
fluffy, bushy leatherywith feathery polyps in a leathery common tissue

how to tell apart

  • large ‘hairy’ cnidarians
  • animals with a ring of tentacles
  • animals with a ring of feathery arms

cnidarians on this site

fern-like
